presets.name: Holypunk
presets.author: @DOTS
presets.description: Have you ever wondered what it'd be like to become a monster? Holypunk explores that, and more. In a world where the Salem witch trials featured real witches (hags disguised as humans) you face a great decision. Powered by DOTS (Decision Oriented Tabletop Systems).
